name: Pensieve Memory
description: Hierarchical persistent memory powered by local SQLite + FTS5. Drop-in replacement for memory-core with conflict resolution and tiered recall.

dbPath.label: Database Path
dbPath.help: Path to the SQLite database file. Supports ~ expansion.

autoResolveConflicts.label: Auto-Resolve Conflicts
autoResolveConflicts.help: Automatically archive stale memories when a new fact with the same topic is stored.

defaultTier.label: Default Memory Tier
defaultTier.help: Default tier for new memories: episodic (raw), semantic (facts), or core (identity).
